title: Newentor Shower Head, High Pressure, Shower Heads with 6 Modes, Power Shower Head Only, Universal Water Saving Large ShowerHead
features: Massage shower head with 6 spray types: spray, massage, manure, spray, massage, manure and massage. It is suitable for shower, head massage, baby bath and pet bathing, besides, of course also for cleaning the bathroom. Different modes are selected that allow you to easily control the water power and water pressure of the shower head to give you an unprecedented bathing experience

LARGE RAIN SHOWER HEAD - The rain shower shower shower is composed of the scratch-resistant pearly plate and shiny chrome surface, which makes them rust-proof and durable. The Newentor hand shower provides you and your family with long-lasting comfort and shower pleasure.

One-handed High Pressure Shower Head: With the special push button on the shower head, you can easily adjust the spray types with one hand. The Newentor shower head simplifies comfort and your enjoyment.
Easy to clean: the shower head is equipped with anti-limescale silicone nozzles. Just wipe it with a towel or sponge to save time and effort.

EASY INSTALLATION Newentor water saving shower head fits most standard shower hoses with 1/2 connector that manually connect to Mintues without tools. The square shower head ensures that your body is completely and evenly wet so you can take a shower.
